name: Edward MacDowell
abstract: Edward Alexander MacDowell (December 18, 1860 – January 23, 1908) was an American composer and pianist of the late Romantic period. He was best known for his second piano concerto and his piano suites Woodland Sketches, Sea Pieces and New England Idylls.

about_quotes.speaker: Marian McPartland
about_quotes.evidence: I also could . . . once I had it down I could memorize it, all these little pieces by Edward MacDowell.
